wiki.summary: “No Pole” is the first track of Love Sick (Deluxe) and was produced Cardo and DJ Fresh. The track was first previewed by Don Toliver via a now-deleted TikTok on February 22, 2022. This is the second song previewed by Don on this platform since the snippet “Time Heals All.” During the tracking week ending, November 9, 2024, the song debuted at #99 on the Hot 100 chart. During the tracking week ending November 16, 2024, the song reached a new peak of #94.The song marked his 31st appearance on the chart. Read more on Last.fm.
